content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 522-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

October 3, 2000


Robert J. Henry
General Counsel
School and College Legal Services
5350 Skylane Boulevard
Santa Rosa, CA 95403

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. 00-218

Dear Mr. Henry:

This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the honoraria provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").¹ The Act requires the Commission to provide written advice to any person whose duties under the Act are in question or to that person's authorized representative. (Section 83114(b); Regulation 18329(b)(1), enclosed.) Formal written advice is the application of the law to a particular set of facts provided by the requestor and has the purpose of conferring immunity on the requestor. (Section 83114(b); Regulation 18329(b)(7).) As such, the Commission does not respond to requests relating to past conduct. (Section 83114(b); Regulation 18329(b)(8)(A).) The Commission may decline to provide informal assistance in such a situation as well. (Section 83114(b); Regulation 18329(c)(4)(A).)

Based on the facts included in your correspondence, we conclude that advice on your question would necessarily relate to past conduct. Therefore, the Commission declines to issue advice on this matter. However, our decision to decline to provide formal or informal advice is not a determination that we have reached a conclusion regarding the question posed in your request.


¹ Government Code sections 81000 - 91015. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109 - 18996, of the California Code of Regulations.

File No. I-00-218
Page 2

For your information, we have enclosed the FPPC document entitled, "Limitations and
Restrictions on Gifts, Honoraria, Travel and Loans (A Fact Sheet for...Designated Employees of
Local Government Agencies)." We hope this information will be useful to you. If you have any
other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.


Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
Assistant General Counsel

By: Natalie Bocanegra
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

LM:NB:jg
Enclosures
